description: Nested graph layers as nested indexes: low entropy core → clusters → full architecture → understanding index

L0_SYSTEM_CORE.description: Lowest entropy: the 11 nodes everything depends on

L1_SKILL_CLUSTERS.description: Skills grouped by function, with cross-cluster dependency edges

L2_FULL_ARCHITECTURE.description: All nodes and edges from system_architecture_v1.json

L3_UNDERSTANDING_INDEX.description: Skills enriched with pointers to scattered docs/explanations

It does NOT look at empirical evidence (that's SIM's job).
It enforces structural integrity only, via a fixed 7-stage pipeline.
